title: ehretia buxifolia var. heterophylla
intro: Ehretia buxifolia var. heterophylla, also known as the boxbrush or Chinese boxbrush, is a plant species native to tropical Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ehretia buxifolia var. heterophylla include relief from fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. This plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being made into tinctures and capsules for medicinal use.
